TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Yemen, title = Yemen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yemen} }

S.FORM: Yemen hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 48 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 527,968 sq km (maki' tay 50ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 527,968 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 27,392,779. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga44.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 1%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 54.50%. kinmhgan(Koka) qani ga,'buyan nya squ kska na hezyal qu cinbwanan. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Sanaa. Kay ru gaga qnxan qqnxan pinbaqan = =snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' = snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 22 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. = =mrhuw Kokka' = mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, aring ryax 27 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Yemen hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 48 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 527,968 sq km (maki' tay 50ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 527,968 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 27,392,779. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga44.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 1%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 54.50%. kinmhgan(Koka) qani ga,'buyan nya squ kska na hezyal qu cinbwanan. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Sanaa. Kay ru gaga qnxan qqnxan pinbaqan = =snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' = snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 22 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. = =mrhuw Kokka' = mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, aring ryax 27 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: jemen ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. kinmńß…£an(koka) qani …£a, Ēő≤ujan nja s~…ēqu ks~…ēka na ńßezjal qu ¶~ ®inő≤wanan. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēanaa. kaj ru …£a…£a qnxan qqnxan pinő≤aqan = =s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē = s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj jma…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. = =mrńßuw kokka Ē = mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a aő≤*raő≤ő≤uńß mans~…ēur ńßa*i, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
